Interface IMapImage

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Carto
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Carto.dll

Provides access to the Map Image Interface.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("8A77BEA2-5541-4ADE-93BC-D5CBA56034C8")]
public interface IMapImage : IImageResult

Properties

Height 

int Height { get; }

Property Value

int

MapExtent

The geographic extent of the map that is fitted to the height and width of the generated image.

IEnvelope MapExtent { get; }

Property Value

IEnvelope

The scale of the generated map image.

double MapScale { get; }

VisibleLayers
